summary: The test suite covers core module functionality well (version parsing, bump type detection, version calculation, changelog generation) and includes integration tests via GitHub Actions/act. However, it has significant gaps: (1) The CLI script (bump-version.ps1) is not tested directly, missing -UseGit, -Since, and parameter combinations; (2) Fixture tests only verify bump types, not actual changelog output or file append behavior; (3) Missing edge cases: pre-release versions, build metadata, missing package.json version field, malformed commits, and CHANGELOG.md creation; (4) Run-ActTests.ps1 is not a Pester test (violates stated requirement that all tests run with Invoke-Pester); (5) Implicit dependency between Workflow.Tests.ps1 and Run-ActTests.ps1 output; (6) Fixture content not visible, preventing assessment of fixture quality. The suite would catch many regressions in core logic but would miss CLI behavior, edge cases, and integration details.
